name: having-find-and-update
description: 先添加having条件，然后通过find查找并动态更新阈值和操作符，模拟用户交互式调整筛选条件
code: const applyBuilder = (builder: VBIBuilder) => { builder.havingFilters.add('销售额', n => n.setOperator('gt').setValue(100000)).add('利润', n => n.setOperator('gt').setValue(10000)); const json = builder.havingFilters.toJson(); const salesId = json[0].id; const profitId = json[1].id; builder.havingFilters.update(salesId, n => { n.setOperator('gte').setValue(500000); }); builder.havingFilters.update(profitId, n => { n.setOperator('gte').setValue(50000); }); }
